name: Stalker Bane Snare
description:
This snare explodes in a burst of cloying powder that can cling to a creature stepping into its square. A creature that enters the square of a stalker bane snare must attempt a save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success Powder sticks to the target, causing it to leave behind telltale footprints. Being makes the target , rather than , to creatures that could see it if it weren't invisible.

Failure Powder clumps on the target, constantly flaking away. Being invisible makes the target , rather than hidden or undetected, to creatures that could see it if it weren't invisible.

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature is until the end of its next turn.
